Best pick: Lenovo LOQ 15.6" FHD Gaming Laptop — best balance of CPU, GPU (RTX 5050), and RAM for gaming and serious multitasking at this budget.

test_cases.expected_topic_or_criteria: The response is helpful if it either (1) provides laptop recommendations that match the user's stated needs (budget, use case, preferences), or (2) asks a relevant clarifying question (e.g., RAM, brand, screen size) to better tailor recommendations. Both recommending and asking one focused follow-up question are valid and on-topic for a recommendation assistant.

test_cases.user_query: Need a laptop for college plus gaming under $1700 (preferably less), open to refurbished. Wants strong performance and good battery life, with good cooling, at least 24–32GB RAM and 1TB storage, and at least 2 USB ports. Should run Helldivers 2 and War Thunder around 100–120 FPS on medium, and future games ~80+ FPS on medium.
test_cases.expected_topic_or_criteria: The response is helpful if it either (1) provides laptop recommendations that match the user's stated needs (budget, use case, preferences), or (2) asks a relevant clarifying question (e.g., RAM, brand, screen size) to better tailor recommendations. Both recommending and asking one focused follow-up question are valid and on-topic for a recommendation assistant.

test_cases.user_query: Looking for a 15–17" laptop under $1000 in the US (California), preferably from Best Buy or Costco, and open to refurbished/used. Needs good battery life and to be reasonably future-proof for office work and basic photo editing (e.g., making Christmas cards). Touchscreen is not needed; a full number pad is nice to have but not required.
test_cases.expected_topic_or_criteria: The response is helpful if it either (1) provides laptop recommendations that match the user's stated needs (budget, use case, preferences), or (2) asks a relevant clarifying question (e.g., RAM, brand, screen size) to better tailor recommendations. Both recommending and asking one focused follow-up question are valid and on-topic for a recommendation assistant.
